calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY (CONTINUED)
Off Calendar Apr-21-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury. Matter was continued from the 4/18/05 master calendar to give parties to settle this matter.

Appearances:
Carole S. Cullum, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Mercy Services Corp.
Theodore M. Janowsky, Esq. on behalf of defendant Victoria Moystom

The parties informed the court that this matter has settled involving the premises located at 240 Jones St., #505, S.F., CA. 94102. Parties recited the written stipulation on the record. The writtien Stipulation Agreement, and in the event of Default, stipulation for entry of judgment, was filed in open court. All parties signed, and agreed to the settlement.

Hon. Robert L. Dondero; Clerks: V. Mu/D. Lok; Reporter: JoAnn Bryce, #3321 (206)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-18-2005 Continued To Apr-21-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carole's Cullum for Plaintiff Mercey Services, Victoria Moystom in pro per

Settlement conference held. Case did not settle. Trial date remains.

Judge Pro Tem Steven Taxman, Clerk: Don Feinberg; Reporter Maria Torreano
